CreateToDoListV2.description: This operation is used to create a new to-do list.

CreateToDoV3.description: This operation is used to create a to-do in the specified to-do list.

DeleteToDoList.description: This operation is used to delete a specific to-do list.

DeleteToDoV2.description: This operation is used to delete a task.

GetAllTodoListsV2.description: Returns a list of all the to-do lists.

GetToDoListV2.description: This operation is used to get a specific to-do list.

GetToDoV3.description: This operation is used to get the to-do with the given Id.

ListToDosByFolderV2.description: This operation is used to retrieve all to-do's from a specific list.

OnNewToDoInFolderV2.displayName: When a new to-do in a specific folder is created (V2)
OnNewToDoInFolderV2.description: Triggers when a new to-do in a specific folder is created.

OnUpdateToDoInFolderV2.displayName: When a to-do in a specific folder is updated (V2)
OnUpdateToDoInFolderV2.description: Triggers when a to-do in a specific folder is updated.

UpdateToDoList.description: This operation is used to update a specific to-do list.

UpdateToDoV2.description: This operation is used to update a specific to-do.
